title: Week 2 Activate — Customer Discovery
prepChecklist: Confirm squads can open Venture Blueprint → Customer Discovery
Review squad missions (Cassiopeia, Pegasus, Argo Navis)
Review Program Coach Deck 02 — customer discovery missions in Venture Blueprint
sessionFlow: Open with Week 2 Activate hero — From Ideas to Evidence
Squads acknowledge mission brief in Customer Discovery Studio
Walk through interview guide encoding (credit for completion, not length)
Thinking-shift prompt: What changed your thinking today?
Close with squad MIS / venture status check
debriefQuestions: What assumption did your squad challenge today?
Which interview will you run first this week?
What evidence do you need before Stage Gate II?
commonPitfalls: Squads writing essays instead of encoding interviews
Skipping portfolio sync after mission prep
Treating Week 2 as individual competition — reinforce Squad XP
coachingTips: Week 2 is open for all squads — no Week 1 submission gate
Mentors use squad weekly review (~1 min), not individual rubrics
Point squads to Customer Discovery as the primary workspace
